description: T-S K5, 16-40. Exercises of children, representing leters in various combinations and copies of the beginnings of the third and the first books of Moses. (Information from Goitein's note cards) Part of a children’s Hebrew textbook with the alphabet ordered according to the scheme 1-8-15, 2-9-16, etc. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: חלק מספר לימוד עברי לילדים עם האלפבית מסודר לפי הסכמה 1-8-15, 2-9-16 וכו'
